target_collision.title: Entity ID already in use
target_collision.description:
The synthetic sensor `{target}` was not created because this entity ID is already used by another entity (origin: `{owner}`). multisource_sensor never overwrites an existing entity.

Fix it by changing `target_format` (or the group's `target`) so it produces a free entity ID, or by removing/renaming the conflicting entity. The sensor is created automatically once the entity ID is free.
